name.ja: <ruby>召<rt>しょう</rt></ruby><ruby>喚<rt>かん</rt></ruby><ruby>僧<rt>そう</rt></ruby>サモンプリースト

requirement.en: Send 1 Spell Card from your hand to the Graveyard, and change this Attack Position card to face-up Defense Position.

effect.en: Excavate the top 6 cards of your Deck. You can Special Summon 1 excavated Level 4 monster face-up to your field. Shuffle the other cards into the Deck. This turn, the monster Special Summoned by this effect cannot attack.
